summary: Iteration 12 - Bug fix verification testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend verified all 3 reported bugs are FIXED: Profile grid post clicks navigate to /post/{id}, Player page has cover image with PanResponder sliders, Calendar has close button.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG #1 FIXED: GET /api/posts/{post_id} returns full post with user info, is_liked, likes_count, recent_likers - VERIFIED via backend tests
BUG #2 FIXED: PUT /api/users/me accepts username field and rejects duplicates with 400 'Username already taken' error - VERIFIED via backend tests
BUG #3 FIXED: Profile grid post clicks now navigate to /post/{id} instead of /comments/{id} - VERIFIED via Playwright UI test

Player page code verified: Has COVER_IMAGE URL, PanResponder-based progress bar with draggable dot, PanResponder-based speed slider with continuous values -5 to +5, 'slow down or speed up' label, -5/+5 buttons, waveform visualization
Calendar page verified: Has close X button in header with data-testid='calendar-close-btn', full calendar UI with year/month/day selectors, time pickers, dance category pills, SAVE button
Edit Profile page verified: Loads correctly with name, username, bio fields, save button, change photo option
Music page verified: Shows playlist header, genre pills, add song/playlist buttons, liked songs option, empty state message
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing posts and user accounts for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 user-reported bugs are FIXED and verified: 1) Profile grid posts navigate to /post/{id}, 2) Player page has cover image and PanResponder sliders for smooth dragging, 3) Speed control is continuous float -5 to +5. Calendar has close X button. Backend endpoints GET /api/posts/{id} and PUT /api/users/me with username validation work correctly. Music player cannot be fully tested via web preview as no songs are uploaded, but code structure verified.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/posts/{post_id}: PASSED - Returns full post with user, is_liked, likes_count, recent_likers

frontend_ui_tests.Login flow: VERIFIED - Keyboard typing works, redirects to /home
frontend_ui_tests.Profile page loads: VERIFIED - Shows username, stats, posts grid, edit profile button
frontend_ui_tests.Post detail page: VERIFIED - Shows full post with author, media, actions, caption, comments
frontend_ui_tests.Music page: VERIFIED - Shows playlist header, genre pills, add buttons, empty state
frontend_ui_tests.Calendar page: VERIFIED - Has close X button, year/month/day selectors, time pickers, categories, SAVE
frontend_ui_tests.Edit Profile page: VERIFIED - Shows name, username, bio fields with save button

code_review_verification.player/[id].tsx cover image: VERIFIED at line 262 - Uses COVER_IMAGE constant URL
code_review_verification.player/[id].tsx progress PanResponder: VERIFIED at lines 157-181 - Smooth dragging with progressDot
code_review_verification.player/[id].tsx speed PanResponder: VERIFIED at lines 184-207 - Continuous -5 to +5 float values
code_review_verification.player/[id].tsx speed label: VERIFIED at line 320 - 'slow down or speed up' text
